labels.notes: Toni Anthony 4:12 — FALSE-SPLIT TAIL of a30cd034. 8 minutes, 1692 words, continues the same insulin-titration teaching that a30cd034 was in the middle of. Should not exist as a separate session. Billing duplicates K030A/Q040A and adds K029A/A007A (assessment) on top of a30cd034's already-billed assessment + time — net effect is double-billed time and double-counted condition codes. Diagnostic code 250 is the same condition as a30cd034 (diabetes management). Same failure-mode set as Kaden phantom 049967be.
